title: Flodesk vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Flodesk vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Flodesk and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. Flodesk is built for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Flodesk wins for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or Mailgun?
faq.a: Mailgun starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
